text:
traditionally common amongest most of the astrologers
to consider the Ascendant (Lagna) as the most important aspect
in predictional astrology.
These astrogers consider the Lagna or the ascendant as
representing 'THE PERSON" of the native. But in the nadi
system of astrology, in a male horoscope "JUPITER" represents
the native; and in a female horoscope "VENUS" represents the
native. In the coming pages it will be seen how futile and wrong
it is to predict keeping the ascendant in view. For instance, if in
a male horoscope, there are Saturn and Mars successively in the
5th and 7th from the ascendant, it is commonly considered that
the 5th sign indicates past good deeds or POOR VA PUNY A and
the 7th sign indicates the wife. Based on these, predictions relating
to progeny will be made. But. it is to observed that these male
planets namely Saturn and Mars cannot beget a child and only if
there are female planets, the question of begetting a child arises.
